one_time_description: Asset retirement obligation recognized for Wei Wai Kum Cruise Ship Terminal under new PS 3280 standard adopted April 1, 2022
economic_notes: Band operates marina, marine fuel dock, timber harvesting, fishing licenses/quota, environmental assessments, shopping centres, real estate, rock hauling, carbon credits, grizzly bear tours. GBEs had combined revenue of $42.2M and net income of $8.45M in 2023.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Band adopted PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations prospectively on April 1, 2022, recognizing $646,936 liability for cruise ship terminal removal. Large deferred revenue increase to $19.65M driven mainly by Province of BC ITA funding of $10.13M received but not yet recognized. Accounts receivable jumped from $1.86M to $15.98M due to $15.82M due from others. 13 GBEs/partnerships accounted for under modified equity method with total assets of $102.6M. No remuneration schedule found in the provided text. total_government_transfers includes ISC $4,976,652 + CMHC $106,995 + FNHA $428,909 + Province of BC $1,996,213 + School District 72 $30,829 = $7,539,598 (rounded to $7,539,549 per line items).
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
